nav.earlyPreviewTitle: We're building in the open—this site is a preview.
nav.underConstructionTitle: Site under construction — only admins can switch to the full site.

home.title: iHost – Host games. Start with Minecraft.
home.subtitle: Create, manage, and share game servers. Start with Minecraft, sync backups to your account, and upgrade when you need more.
home.downloadFromDashboard: Register for free. Download the desktop app after signing in.
home.featureOneDesc: Vanilla, Paper, Purpur, Fabric. Pick a version and go.
home.featureTwoDesc: Relay tunnel so others can join without port forwarding.
home.featureThreeDesc: Free forever to run servers. Add cloud backup ($3.99/mo) or AI + credits ($11.99/mo) in the app.
home.freeTierDesc: Unlimited servers, 50 API requests/month. No backup, no AI.
home.upgradeTiersDesc: Backup: settings, mods, plugins, server files. Pro: backup + AI with monthly credits.
home.productsSubheading: iHost apps let you host and manage game servers. Minecraft is here now; more games coming.
home.productMinecraftDesc: Full server manager: Vanilla, Paper, Purpur, Fabric. Mods, plugins, share with friends, optional cloud backup.
home.productMoreComingDesc: We're expanding to other games. Stay tuned.
home.backProjectDesc: iHost is open source and built in the open. Star the repo, tell others, and help us grow. Every star and contribution counts.
home.earlyMembersDesc: Join early members who run game servers with iHost. Get the desktop app, manage servers, and shape what comes next.
home.diyDesc: Like comma.ai: get the repo, load it on your own hardware, and run the stack your way. We'll document hardware options and images so you can build your own iHost node.

pricing.title: Plans and pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade to Backup or Pro in the desktop app or from your dashboard.
pricing.freeDesc: Unlimited servers, 50 API requests/month. No cloud backup, no AI.
pricing.backupDesc: Cloud backup or connect your own (e.g. Google Drive): settings, mods, plugins, server files. World backup is separate.
pricing.proDesc: Everything in Backup plus AI features and 500 free AI credits per month; buy more anytime.
pricing.backupNoteBody: Backup tier includes settings, mods, plugins, and server files—not the world map. We offer world backup as part of our server product; see the app or dashboard for details.
pricing.subscribeNote: Subscribe in the iHost app (Settings → Account) or from the dashboard after signing in.

credits.title: AI credits
credits.subtitle: Use AI features in the app. Pro includes 500 free credits per month; any plan can buy extra packs.
credits.howToBuyDesc: Open the iHost app, go to Settings → Account, and use the Buy credits section. Or open your dashboard account page.

about.title: About iHost
about.subtitle: We're building tools to host and manage game servers—starting with Minecraft.
about.productDesc: iHost is a desktop app and web dashboard. Create servers, add mods and plugins, sync backups to the cloud, and get help from an AI advisor. We're in active development and opening access gradually.
about.teamDesc: We're a small team building iHost in the open. Sign up to try the app, share feedback, and help shape what comes next.

auth.networkErrorHint: If using Firefox with HTTPS-Only Mode, use an HTTPS API URL or add an exception for the API host.
auth.checkEmailVerify: Check your email to verify your address.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.success: Your email is verified. You can close this and use the app or sign in on the website.
verifyEmail.invalid: Invalid or expired link. Request a new verification email from sign in.
verifyEmail.checkInbox: We sent a verification link to your email. Check your inbox and click the link.
verifyEmail.alreadyVerified: Already verified? You can go to the app.

verifyEmailWait.title: Verify your email
verifyEmailWait.description: We sent a verification link to your email. Click it to confirm your address.
verifyEmailWait.autoRefresh: This page will refresh automatically once your email is verified.

confirmAccount.title: Sign in to the app
confirmAccount.description: Use this account to sign in to the iHost app?
confirmAccount.sessionExpiredDescription: The link between the app and this page has expired or was closed. To sign in from the app, try again: open “Sign in with browser” in the app and complete the login flow again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we will send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.sent: If an account exists, we sent a reset link to that email.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.success: Password reset. You can sign in now.
resetPassword.invalid: Invalid or expired link. Request a new reset link.

footer.openSource: iHost is open source and actively developed. Register free, back us on GitHub, and help shape what comes next.
footer.githubComingBody: We're preparing to publish iHost on GitHub and open it to the public. We're not there yet—but we're working on it for a full public release with the best outcome for everyone.
footer.joinStep1: Sign up free and download the app
footer.joinStep2: Run game servers (Minecraft is live; more games coming)
footer.joinStep3: Star us on GitHub, share feedback, and help shape the product

products.title: iHost products
products.subtitle: Apps and services to host and manage your game servers.
products.minecraftDesc: Create and run Minecraft Java servers. Vanilla, Paper, Purpur, Fabric. Mods, plugins, share with friends, optional cloud backup and AI.
products.minecraftFeature2: Share with friends via relay (no port forwarding)
products.minecraftFeature3: Backup tier: sync settings and files to your account
products.moreComingDesc: We're expanding to other games. Stay tuned for updates.
products.moreComingHint: Follow the app and docs for announcements.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.subtitle: Get started, host servers, and manage backups with iHost.
docs.gettingStartedDesc: Create an account and download the desktop app to run servers from your machine.
docs.hostingServersDesc: Use the Minecraft app to create servers. Your tier controls backup and sync.
docs.backupAndTiersDesc: Free: run servers. Backup tier: sync to cloud. Pro: backup + AI credits.
docs.fullDocsDesc: More guides and API docs are coming. Want to contribute?

contribute.title: Contribute to iHost
contribute.subtitle: Code, docs, and feedback help make iHost better for everyone.
contribute.codeDesc: The project is open for contributions. Check the repo for issues and guidelines.
contribute.codeHint: Fork, make changes, and open a pull request.
contribute.docsDesc: Help improve guides and docs. See the docs page for current content.
contribute.feedbackDesc: Found a bug or have an idea? We'd love to hear from you.
contribute.feedbackHint: Use the app feedback option or open an issue on GitHub.
contribute.thanksDesc: Every contribution—code, docs, or feedback—helps the community.

cookieConsent.title: Cookie preferences
cookieConsent.message: We use cookies and similar technologies to run the site and to understand how you use it. In the EEA and UK you can choose to accept only essential cookies.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.researchBody: We use the information you provide (e.g. email, account data) to run the service, support you, and improve the product. We do not sell your data to third parties.
privacy.statsBody: When you consent, we may use Google Analytics (or similar) to understand how the site is used. This helps us improve the service. You can withdraw consent at any time via the cookie notice.
privacy.noThirdPartyBody: We use Stripe for payments and may use other trusted providers for infrastructure. Their privacy policies apply to the data they process on our behalf.
privacy.cookiesBody: We use essential cookies (e.g. session, language) to run the site. With your consent we may set analytics cookies. See our Cookie Policy for details.
privacy.gdprBody: If you are in the European Economic Area or UK, you have rights to access, correct, delete, or restrict use of your data, and to object to processing. Contact us to exercise these rights.

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.whatBody: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the site work, remember your preferences, and (with consent) analyse usage.
cookiePolicy.weUseBody: We use cookies to keep you signed in, remember your language, and to run the site securely. With your consent we also use analytics (e.g. Google Analytics) to understand how the site is used.
cookiePolicy.analyticsBody: If you click “Accept all”, we may set cookies from Google Analytics (or similar) to measure traffic and usage. These are optional and only used when you consent.
cookiePolicy.essentialBody: Essential cookies are required for the site to function (e.g. session, authentication, language). They cannot be disabled if you use the service.
cookiePolicy.controlBody: You can change your choice at any time. Use the cookie notice at the bottom of the page (if shown) or clear your browser cookies. Withdrawing consent only affects future visits.
cookiePolicy.eeaBody: If you are in the European Economic Area or the UK, we ask for your consent before setting non-essential cookies, in line with ePrivacy and GDPR.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.acceptanceBody: By using iHost (the website and services), you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.
terms.serviceBody: iHost provides software and services to host and manage game servers. We offer a free tier and paid tiers (e.g. backup, Pro). Availability and features may change; we will communicate material changes.
terms.accountBody: You are responsible for keeping your account secure and for activity under it. You must provide accurate information and comply with applicable laws.
terms.conductBody: You must not use the service for illegal purposes, to harm others, or to violate third-party rights. We may suspend or terminate access for breach of these terms.
terms.liabilityBody: To the extent permitted by law, we are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages. Our liability is limited as set out in applicable law.
terms.changesBody: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance. We will indicate the last updated date at the top of this page.
terms.contactBody: For questions about these terms, privacy, or cookies, use the contact options on the website or open an issue on our GitHub repository.

comingSoonPage.title: We're building {brand}
comingSoonPage.subtitle: A desktop app to host and manage game servers—starting with Minecraft. Get notified when we launch.
comingSoonPage.notifySubtitle: One email when {brand} is ready. No spam.
comingSoonPage.formTrust: We only use your contact to notify you at launch. No spam.
comingSoonPage.underConstructionBar: Site under construction — we're building in the open.
comingSoonPage.whyJoin1: One email when we launch — no newsletters, no clutter.
comingSoonPage.whyJoin2: Early access and feedback shape the product from day one.
comingSoonPage.whyJoin3: Your contact stays private and is never shared or sold.
comingSoonPage.appPreviewSubtitle: Desktop app preview — Minecraft first, cloud backup, AI advisor.
